title: Haton Window Film Privacy for Glass Windows Frosted Film Frosting 90x200cm, Opaque Glass Sticker Self Adhesive Roll UV Block No Glue Static Cling Vinyl Covering for Bathroom Home and Office
features: Protect Your Privacy: Our window film privacy offers high-level private protection, allowing you to relax and enjoy your own private space. Perfect for your office, bathroom, bedroom, living room, and more, this frosted window film rejects unwanted views from outside.

Simple Installation: With our glass frosting film, you can cut it to the size you need and install it in minutes with just water. It works perfectly on any flat and smooth glass surface, providing you with years of privacy and protection.

No Glue, No Residue: Our window privacy film self-adhesive has a super static cling design without any sticky glue, making it easy and hassle-free to use. Plus, it's reusable and leaves no residue, so you can remove and reuse it whenever you want.

Decorative and Economical: Our classic white frosted looking window film adds both style and function to your home decor. You can cover the whole window surface or trim it into different sizes to make your window look special. This window film is a wonderful substitute for expensive curtains or window blinds, providing you with a cost-effective solution to enhance your home's privacy and beauty. Additionally, it will not cause any damage to your walls, glass, or window sills

UV Blocking: Our frosted window film privacy is more than just privacy. It also blocks 84% of UVA rays and 99% of UVB rays, protecting your delicate furniture from sun damage, fading, and cracking. It even helps your plants thrive by filtering out dazzling sunlight.
description: Product Description Protection comes first: Premium frosting window film supports your leisure time with your family and pets without interruption. You can work on your projects with peace of mind or enjoy your reading time. Enjoy private time with Haton opaque window film Are you afraid of prying eyes from strangers or neighbors? Do you want the pets to stop barking when they are attracted to novelties outside? Do you want to decorate your house with a simple design? If so, Haton frosted privacy film is the best choice for you! Static Adhesion: Non-adhesive makes it super easy to apply and remove. No residue after removal and reusable multiple times. Our self-adhesive window film reduces glare and relieves the eyes when exposed to light. Effectively blocks 84% of UVA rays and 99% of UVB rays and protects your skin and furniture from damage Our window film is waterproof and lasts longer, so you don't have to replace it regularly. Protect your pets from direct sunlight so they can develop well. The classic white matte look adds style and function to your home decor. You can use it to cover the entire window surface or cut the adhesive film windows to different sizes to give your window a special look. Great alternative to expensive curtains or blinds Previous page Next page Rich usage scenarios 1 Kitchen 2 Shower room 3 meeting rooms 4 home decor Instructions: Measure and cut Important note: This glass film only works on the flat, clean and smooth surface. It does not stick well to plastic, broken or uneven surfaces. Small frosted glass film brings the big change!
